channel.title: flove making-of — visibility questions
channel.description: New visibility design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: What granularity for visibility controls?
item.description:
• Per-element — Each element has its own visibility. Maximum control, maximum complexity. • 0asis defaults — Global defaults, no per-element override. Simple, less flexible. • Hybrid — Default from 0asis, with per-element override option. Balanced.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Hybrid
